title: 「well + 形容詞／過去分詞」句型

source.file: Sentence Structure 99 -「well + 形容詞／過去分詞」句.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject + be + a / an + well- + adjective / past participle + noun

formulas.formula: Subject + be + a / an + well- + adjective / past participle + noun

formulas.labelZh: 放在 be、keep、remain 等動詞後
formulas.formula: Subject + be / keep / remain + well + adjective / past participle

example: Hong Kong is a well-developed city.
exampleZh: 香港是一個發展成熟的城市。

examples.en: Hong Kong is a well-developed city.
examples.zh: 香港是一個發展成熟的城市。

examples.en: I try to keep my room well organised.
examples.zh: 我會盡量把房間保持得井井有條。

examples.en: People need to be well prepared for a meeting.
examples.zh: 人們需要為會議做好充分準備。

meaning.zh: Well 放在形容詞或過去分詞之前，表示某件事做得好、安排得好，或達到理想水平。

rules.zh: Well 不只是表示「非常」，而是表示某件事做得好、安排得好，或達到理想水平。
rules.en: Well does not simply mean very; it shows that something is done or arranged to a good standard.

rules.zh: 放在名詞前時，要使用連字號。
rules.en: Use a hyphen when the well compound comes before a noun.

rules.zh: 放在 be、keep、remain 等動詞後時，本練習不使用連字號。
rules.en: In this exercise, do not use a hyphen after linking verbs such as be, keep and remain.

rules.zh: Well 後面通常使用過去分詞或固定形容詞，例如 well written、well prepared、well maintained 和 well adjusted。
rules.en: Well is normally followed by a past participle or a fixed adjective.

rules.zh: 部分詞語有固定意思，例如 well done、well adjusted、well known、well rounded、well articulated 和 well projected。
rules.en: Some well combinations have established meanings.

rules.zh: 本練習使用英式英語拼法，例如 well-organised、well-recognised 和 well-practised。
rules.en: This exercise uses British English spellings.

benefits.zh: 這個句型不只是說明某件事已完成，還可以更準確地說明它完成得好不好。
benefits.en: It describes quality more precisely by showing how well something has been completed.

benefits.zh: 它可以把較長的描述縮短，令句子更短、更直接。
benefits.en: It can shorten a longer description and make the sentence more direct.

benefits.zh: Well-developed、well-prepared 和 well-maintained 可以直接放在名詞前，讓讀者立即知道人物或事物的特點。
benefits.en: It places important information directly before a noun.

benefits.zh: 它可以避免重複使用 very good，並更具體地說明究竟哪一方面做得好。
benefits.en: It avoids repeatedly using very good by naming the exact quality.

benefits.zh: 這個句型適合用於作文、報告和口語評價人物、工作、設施、計劃、文章和演講。
benefits.en: It is useful in essays, reports and spoken evaluations.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using well + adjective or past participle.
Use a hyphen when the compound adjective comes before a noun.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 well + 形容詞或過去分詞改寫以下句子。
當複合形容詞放在名詞前時，請使用連字號。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Hong Kong is a city. It has developed to a high level.
questions.promptZh: 香港是一個城市。它的發展水平很成熟。
questions.answer: Hong Kong is a well-developed city.
questions.answerZh: 香港是一個發展成熟的城市。
questions.highlight: Hong Kong is a well-developed city.

questions.prompt: I keep my room carefully organised.
questions.promptZh: 我會細心整理房間，並保持整齊。
questions.answer: I keep my room well organised.
questions.answerZh: 我會把房間保持得井井有條。
questions.highlight: I keep my room well organised.

questions.prompt: Sara was fully ready for the test.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉已為考試做好充分準備。
questions.answer: Sara was well prepared for the test.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉為考試做好了充分準備。
questions.highlight: Sara was well prepared for the test.

questions.prompt: This report is written clearly.
questions.promptZh: 這份報告寫得很清楚。
questions.answer: This is a well-written report.
questions.answerZh: 這是一份寫得很好的報告。
questions.highlight: This is a well-written report.

questions.prompt: The school garden is kept in good condition.
questions.promptZh: 學校花園保持在良好狀態。
questions.answer: The school garden is well maintained.
questions.answerZh: 學校花園保養得很好。
questions.highlight: The school garden is well maintained.

questions.prompt: This chair was made with care and skill.
questions.promptZh: 這張椅子製作得細心，而且手工良好。
questions.answer: This chair is well made.
questions.answerZh: 這張椅子造工良好。
questions.highlight: This chair is well made.

questions.prompt: The children behaved properly during the visit.
questions.promptZh: 孩子們在參觀期間表現恰當。
questions.answer: The children were well behaved during the visit.
questions.answerZh: 孩子們在參觀期間表現良好。
questions.highlight: The children were well behaved during the visit.

questions.prompt: The classroom is lit brightly and evenly.
questions.promptZh: 課室的光線明亮而均勻。
questions.answer: The classroom is well lit.
questions.answerZh: 課室的照明十分充足。
questions.highlight: The classroom is well lit.

questions.prompt: The nurse is thoroughly trained for this task.
questions.promptZh: 護士為這項工作接受了全面訓練。
questions.answer: The nurse is well trained for this task.
questions.answerZh: 護士為這項工作接受了良好訓練。
questions.highlight: The nurse is well trained for this task.

questions.prompt: The job was completed to a high standard.
questions.promptZh: 這項工作以高水平完成。
questions.answer: The job was well done.
questions.answerZh: 這項工作完成得很好。
questions.highlight: The job was well done.

questions.prompt: The meeting was organised carefully by the manager.
questions.promptZh: 會議由經理細心籌備。
questions.answer: The meeting was well organised by the manager.
questions.answerZh: 會議由經理安排得井井有條。
questions.highlight: The meeting was well organised by the manager.

questions.prompt: This plan is carefully designed.
questions.promptZh: 這個計劃設計得很仔細。
questions.answer: This is a well-designed plan.
questions.answerZh: 這是一個設計完善的計劃。
questions.highlight: This is a well-designed plan.

questions.prompt: The main idea was expressed clearly.
questions.promptZh: 主要觀點表達得很清楚。
questions.answer: The main idea was well articulated.
questions.answerZh: 主要觀點闡述得很清楚。
questions.highlight: The main idea was well articulated.

questions.prompt: His voice reached the back of the hall clearly.
questions.promptZh: 他的聲音清楚地傳到禮堂後方。
questions.answer: His voice was well projected to the back of the hall.
questions.answerZh: 他的聲音能清楚傳到禮堂後方。
questions.highlight: His voice was well projected to the back of the hall.

questions.prompt: The old building is kept in excellent condition.
questions.promptZh: 這座舊建築物保持在非常良好的狀態。
questions.answer: The old building is well maintained.
questions.answerZh: 這座舊建築物保養得很好。
questions.highlight: The old building is well maintained.

questions.prompt: The shop is run efficiently.
questions.promptZh: 這間店舖營運得很有效率。
questions.answer: The shop is well managed.
questions.answerZh: 這間店舖管理得宜。
questions.highlight: The shop is well managed.

questions.prompt: The science laboratory has all the equipment students need.
questions.promptZh: 科學實驗室備有學生所需的全部設備。
questions.answer: The science laboratory is well equipped.
questions.answerZh: 科學實驗室設備完善。
questions.highlight: The science laboratory is well equipped.

questions.prompt: The article is based on careful research.
questions.promptZh: 這篇文章以仔細研究為基礎。
questions.answer: The article is well researched.
questions.answerZh: 這篇文章的研究十分充分。
questions.highlight: The article is well researched.

questions.prompt: The instructions are arranged in a clear order.
questions.promptZh: 這些指示按清晰次序排列。
questions.answer: The instructions are well structured.
questions.answerZh: 這些指示結構清晰。
questions.highlight: The instructions are well structured.

questions.prompt: The team selected the date carefully.
questions.promptZh: 團隊仔細選擇了這個日期。
questions.answer: The date was well chosen by the team.
questions.answerZh: 團隊選擇了一個合適的日期。
questions.highlight: The date was well chosen by the team.

questions.prompt: The neighbourhood has convenient road and rail links.
questions.promptZh: 這個社區有便利的道路及鐵路連接。
questions.answer: This is a well-connected neighbourhood.
questions.answerZh: 這是一個交通網絡完善的社區。
questions.highlight: This is a well-connected neighbourhood.

questions.prompt: The young child has adjusted successfully to school life.
questions.promptZh: 這名年幼孩子已成功適應校園生活。
questions.answer: The young child is well adjusted to school life.
questions.answerZh: 這名年幼孩子已良好適應校園生活。
questions.highlight: The young child is well adjusted to school life.

questions.prompt: Mina is an author whom many people know.
questions.promptZh: 米娜是一位很多人都認識的作家。
questions.answer: Mina is a well-known author.
questions.answerZh: 米娜是一位知名作家。
questions.highlight: Mina is a well-known author.

questions.prompt: The candidate has the right education and skills for the job.
questions.promptZh: 這名應徵者具備這份工作所需的學歷和技能。
questions.answer: The candidate is well qualified for the job.
questions.answerZh: 這名應徵者充分具備這份工作的資格。
questions.highlight: The candidate is well qualified for the job.

questions.prompt: This local charity has operated for many years and is trusted in the community.
questions.promptZh: 這間本地慈善機構營運多年，並深受社區信任。
questions.answer: It is a well-established local charity.
questions.answerZh: 這是一間根基穩固的本地慈善機構。
questions.highlight: It is a well-established local charity.

questions.prompt: Strong evidence supports the research findings.
questions.promptZh: 有力證據支持這些研究結果。
questions.answer: The research findings are well supported by strong evidence.
questions.answerZh: 這些研究結果有充分的有力證據支持。
questions.highlight: The research findings are well supported by strong evidence.

questions.prompt: The safety procedures are recorded clearly and in detail.
questions.promptZh: 安全程序記錄得清楚而詳細。
questions.answer: The safety procedures are well documented.
questions.answerZh: 安全程序已有清楚而詳細的記錄。
questions.highlight: The safety procedures are well documented.

questions.prompt: The teacher explained the proposal clearly.
questions.promptZh: 老師清楚解釋了這項建議。
questions.answer: The proposal was well explained by the teacher.
questions.answerZh: 老師把這項建議解釋得很清楚。
questions.highlight: The proposal was well explained by the teacher.

questions.prompt: The two colours look good together.
questions.promptZh: 這兩種顏色配搭得很好。
questions.answer: The two colours are well matched.
questions.answerZh: 這兩種顏色配搭得很好。
questions.highlight: The two colours are well matched.

questions.prompt: The job is suitable for Leo’s skills and personality.
questions.promptZh: 這份工作適合里奧的技能和性格。
questions.answer: Leo is well suited to the job.
questions.answerZh: 里奧很適合這份工作。
questions.highlight: Leo is well suited to the job.

questions.prompt: The report has a clear introduction, middle section and conclusion.
questions.promptZh: 這份報告有清楚的引言、主體及結論。
questions.answer: The report is well structured.
questions.answerZh: 這份報告結構清晰。
questions.highlight: The report is well structured.

questions.prompt: The speaker presented the information clearly and professionally.
questions.promptZh: 講者清楚而專業地講解資料。
questions.answer: The information was well presented by the speaker.
questions.answerZh: 講者把資料表達得清楚而專業。
questions.highlight: The information was well presented by the speaker.

questions.prompt: The film was made to a high technical standard.
questions.promptZh: 這部電影以高技術水平製作。
questions.answer: It was a well-produced film.
questions.answerZh: 這是一部製作精良的電影。
questions.highlight: It was a well-produced film.

questions.prompt: Staff responded positively to the new policy.
questions.promptZh: 員工對新政策反應正面。
questions.answer: The new policy was well received by staff.
questions.answerZh: 新政策獲員工正面接受。
questions.highlight: The new policy was well received by staff.

questions.prompt: A large number of people attended the public talk.
questions.promptZh: 很多人出席了這場公開講座。
questions.answer: It was a well-attended public talk.
questions.answerZh: 這是一場出席人數眾多的公開講座。
questions.highlight: It was a well-attended public talk.

questions.prompt: The company gives its engineers good salaries.
questions.promptZh: 公司給工程師優厚薪酬。
questions.answer: The engineers are well paid by the company.
questions.answerZh: 這間公司給予工程師優厚薪酬。
questions.highlight: The engineers are well paid by the company.

questions.prompt: The warning came at exactly the right moment.
questions.promptZh: 警告在最適當的時刻出現。
questions.answer: The warning was well timed.
questions.answerZh: 這項警告發出的時機非常恰當。
questions.highlight: The warning was well timed.

questions.prompt: The writer selected the examples carefully.
questions.promptZh: 作者仔細選擇了例子。
questions.answer: The examples were well chosen by the writer.
questions.answerZh: 作者選擇的例子十分恰當。
questions.highlight: The examples were well chosen by the writer.

questions.prompt: The email uses clear, polite and suitable language.
questions.promptZh: 這封電郵使用清楚、有禮而合適的措辭。
questions.answer: It is a well-worded email.
questions.answerZh: 這是一封措辭恰當的電郵。
questions.highlight: It is a well-worded email.

questions.prompt: The museum protects its oldest paintings carefully.
questions.promptZh: 博物館小心保護館內最古老的畫作。
questions.answer: The museum’s oldest paintings are well protected.
questions.answerZh: 博物館內最古老的畫作受到妥善保護。
questions.highlight: The museum’s oldest paintings are well protected.

questions.prompt: The community centre has enough money to run all its programmes properly.
questions.promptZh: 社區中心有足夠資金妥善營辦所有活動。
questions.answer: The community centre is well funded.
questions.answerZh: 這間社區中心資金充足。
questions.highlight: The community centre is well funded.

questions.prompt: The coach has given the team strong motivation to continue working towards the goal.
questions.promptZh: 教練給予球隊強大動力，讓他們繼續朝目標努力。
questions.answer: The team is well motivated to continue working towards the goal.
questions.answerZh: 球隊有充分動力繼續朝目標努力。
questions.highlight: The team is well motivated to continue working towards the goal.

questions.prompt: The new system has been tested carefully in many different situations.
questions.promptZh: 新系統已在多種不同情況下接受仔細測試。
questions.answer: The new system has been well tested in many different situations.
questions.answerZh: 新系統已在多種不同情況下接受充分測試。
questions.highlight: The new system has been well tested in many different situations.

questions.prompt: Clear signs show the hiking route from beginning to end.
questions.promptZh: 清楚的標誌由起點到終點指示行山路線。
questions.answer: The hiking route is well marked from beginning to end.
questions.answerZh: 行山路線由起點到終點都有清楚標示。
questions.highlight: The hiking route is well marked from beginning to end.

questions.prompt: The hospital is in a convenient place near several bus routes.
questions.promptZh: 醫院位於數條巴士路線附近的便利位置。
questions.answer: The hospital is well located near several bus routes.
questions.answerZh: 醫院的位置便利，鄰近數條巴士路線。
questions.highlight: The hospital is well located near several bus routes.

questions.prompt: The report expresses its central argument in a clear and effective way.
questions.promptZh: 報告以清楚而有效的方式表達核心論點。
questions.answer: The report’s central argument is well articulated.
questions.answerZh: 報告的核心論點闡述得清楚有力。
questions.highlight: The report’s central argument is well articulated.

questions.prompt: The actor spoke loudly and clearly enough for the whole theatre to hear every line.
questions.promptZh: 演員說話響亮清楚，讓整個劇院都能聽到每句對白。
questions.answer: The actor’s voice was well projected, so the whole theatre could hear every line.
questions.answerZh: 演員的聲線投射清楚有力，因此整個劇院都能聽到每句對白。
questions.highlight: The actor’s voice was well projected, so the whole theatre could hear every line.

questions.prompt: The school provides education that develops students academically, socially and physically.
questions.promptZh: 學校提供能促進學生學業、社交及體能發展的教育。
questions.answer: The school provides a well-rounded education.
questions.answerZh: 學校提供全面均衡的教育。
questions.highlight: The school provides a well-rounded education.

questions.prompt: Because the staff had studied and practised the emergency plan, they were fully ready for the event.
questions.promptZh: 由於員工已研習並練習緊急應變計劃，他們已為活動做好充分準備。
questions.answer: The staff were well prepared for the event because they had studied and practised the emergency plan.
questions.answerZh: 員工已研習並練習緊急應變計劃，因此為活動做好了充分準備。
questions.highlight: The staff were well prepared for the event because they had studied and practised the emergency plan.

questions.prompt: The building has a strong structure, is kept in good condition and has convenient transport links.
questions.promptZh: 這座建築物結構穩固、保養良好，而且交通連接方便。
questions.answer: The building is well built, well maintained and well connected.
questions.answerZh: 這座建築物建造穩固、保養良好，而且交通連接方便。
questions.highlight: The building is well built, well maintained and well connected.
